name: weight-based-dose-field
title: Weight-Based Dose Field
description: mg/kg × weight dose calculator that shows its working, cap, and rounding.

props.name: defaultValue
props.type: { mgPerKg?: number | null; weightKg?: number | null }

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with { mgPerKg, weightKg, dose, capped }.

props.name: maxDose
props.description: Cap in `unit`; the computed dose never exceeds it.

props.name: roundTo
props.description: Round the dose down to the nearest dispensable increment.

clinicalNotes: Always show the calculation, the weight used, and whether a cap was applied — a bare computed number hides the weight-entry error that causes paediatric overdoses, so the full working is rendered ('15 mg/kg × 18 kg = 270 mg, capped at 200 mg'). The component computes arithmetic only and is not a dosing authority; the prescriber confirms. Rounding is floor-to-increment so it never rounds a dose up past a safe amount.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes field + input. Emits the structured result plus a capped flag.
